task:
Configure custom hotkeys in OBS Studio. Two scenes named exactly 'Intro' and 'Main' must exist (a default 'Scene' may remain or be removed — it is not checked).

Set these hotkeys:
- 'Switch to scene' for 'Intro' = F1
- 'Switch to scene' for 'Main' = F2
- Mute the default 'Desktop Audio' source = Ctrl+M

Persist the changes to the OBS configuration.

verification.description: Hotkey F1 bound to switch to 'Intro'
Hotkey F2 bound to switch to 'Main'

verification.eval: any(b.get('key') == 'OBS_KEY_M' and b.get('control') for b in (result.get('hotkeys', {}) or {}).get('libobs.mute', []))
